title: Solène Silk Column Gown
tags: eveningwear, silk gown, bias cut, champagne, cowl back, black-tie, floor-length, mulberry silk, minimalist, occasion, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Solène Silk-Satin Column Gown in Oyster Champagne — TEEORA
seo_description: A bias-cut mulberry silk column gown with an open cowl back. Fluid, minimal eveningwear in oyster champagne. Discover TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
A gown reduced to its most essential line. Cut on the true bias from weighty mulberry silk-satin, Solène traces the body without gripping it, releasing into a quiet pool of fabric at the floor. The front sits clean and high; the back opens to a soft cowl that moves with the light. There is no embellishment — only the fluid fall of the cloth and the champagne sheen that shifts from oyster to warm gold as you turn. Finished with hand-rolled hems and a concealed closure, it is eveningwear for those who prefer presence to spectacle.

Material: 100% mulberry silk-satin, bias-cut, silk-lined. Colour: Oyster champagne.

title: Atlas Wrap Coat
tags: outerwear, wrap coat, wool coat, cashmere, camel, belted coat, double-faced, unlined, mid-calf, minimalist, tailored, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Atlas Double-Faced Wool-Cashmere Wrap Coat in Camel — TEEORA
seo_description: A hand-finished double-faced wool and cashmere wrap coat in camel. Belted, unlined, mid-calf. Timeless outerwear from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The coat a wardrobe organises itself around. Atlas is cut from double-faced virgin wool and cashmere — two woven faces joined by hand so the cloth needs no lining and shows no seams at the edge. It wraps and ties rather than buttons, drawing a soft column at the waist before falling clean to mid-calf. The camel tone is deep and even, the kind that reads as quiet money in any light. Roomy through the shoulder to layer over knitwear or tailoring, it is finished with hand-felled edges and deep patch pockets. Considered, warm, endlessly re-wearable.

Material: Double-faced virgin wool & cashmere (90/10). Colour: Camel.

title: Margaux Crepe Blazer
tags: tailoring, blazer, wool crepe, black blazer, single-breasted, soft shoulder, suiting, workwear, evening, minimalist, longline, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Margaux Wool-Crepe Single-Breasted Blazer in Ink Black — TEEORA
seo_description: A softly tailored wool-crepe blazer with an elongated lapel in ink black. Fluid, modern tailoring from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Tailoring with the ease of a robe. Margaux is built from fluid wool-crepe that drapes rather than holds, giving a soft, deconstructed shoulder and a long lapel that lengthens the whole line. A single covered button closes at the natural waist; the body falls clean over the hip. The matte ink-black finish absorbs light for a deep, uniform darkness that flatters day or evening. Wear it over a slip for dinner or with its matching trouser as a suit. Half-canvassed by hand and finished with fine welt pockets, it is the modern blazer — precise, but never stiff.

Material: Wool-crepe. Colour: Ink black.

title: Rue Wide-Leg Trousers
tags: trousers, wide leg, high waist, wool trousers, taupe, pleated, tailored pants, suiting, minimalist, full length, workwear, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Rue High-Waist Wide-Leg Wool Trousers in Sand Taupe — TEEORA
seo_description: High-waisted, single-pleat wide-leg trousers in fluid sand-taupe wool gabardine. Elongating tailored trousers from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The trouser that does the work of a heel. Rue sits high at the natural waist and falls in one long, fluid line from a single sharp pleat, pooling just so over the shoe. Cut from a mid-weight wool-blend gabardine, it holds a pressed crease while still moving with you. The sand-taupe tone bridges every neutral in the wardrobe, reading warm against ivory knits and crisp against black tailoring. A clean side clasp keeps the front uninterrupted. Elongating, quietly powerful, and endlessly versatile — from the office to dinner without a second thought.

Material: Wool-blend gabardine. Colour: Sand taupe.

title: Neige Cashmere Rib Sweater
tags: knitwear, cashmere, rib sweater, ivory, high neck, cropped, dropped shoulder, luxury knit, layering, minimalist, jumper, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Neige Fine-Rib Cashmere Sweater in Ivory Bone — TEEORA
seo_description: A high-neck fine-rib sweater in Grade-A Mongolian cashmere, ivory bone. Soft, cropped, layerable knitwear from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The kind of sweater you reach for on instinct. Neige is knitted from Grade-A Mongolian cashmere in a fine 7-gauge rib that hugs quietly and holds its shape wash after wash. The neck sits high and soft; the shoulder drops just enough for ease; the hem falls a touch cropped to pair with high-waisted tailoring. In a warm ivory bone that flatters every complexion, it is understated luxury you feel more than see. Fully-fashioned seams and rib-set cuffs keep the finish clean and durable. A forever piece, made to be layered, lived in, and kept for years.

Material: 100% Grade-A Mongolian cashmere. Colour: Ivory bone.

title: Dune Draped Cowl Midi Dress
tags: dress, midi dress, silk crepe, cowl neck, olive, sage green, draped, sleeveless, occasion, minimalist, day to night, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Dune Silk-Crepe Cowl-Neck Midi Dress in Olive Sage — TEEORA
seo_description: A draped cowl-neck midi dress in heavy matte silk-crepe, olive sage. Fluid, elegant everyday-to-evening dressing from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Movement, distilled. Dune is cut from a heavy matte silk-crepe that drapes with real weight — a soft cowl gathering at the neck, a lightly cinched waist, and a bias skirt that swings clean to mid-calf. The olive-sage tone is muted and sophisticated, a colour borrowed from the landscape rather than the trend cycle. Sleeveless and unadorned, it relies entirely on the fall of the cloth for its drama. Layer it under a coat through winter, or let it stand alone for dinner. Finished with an invisible closure and a self-tie waist, it is the quiet dress that always feels right.

Material: Heavy silk-crepe. Colour: Olive sage.

title: Cira Leather Midi Skirt
tags: skirt, leather skirt, midi skirt, nappa, espresso, high waist, column, lined, luxury leather, minimalist, back slit, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Cira Nappa Leather Midi Column Skirt in Espresso — TEEORA
seo_description: A high-waisted nappa lamb leather midi skirt in espresso brown with a walking slit. Supple, lined luxury leather from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Leather, made quiet. Cira is cut from butter-soft nappa lamb into a high-waisted column that skims the hip and falls straight to the lower calf, with a fine back slit for movement. The espresso tone is deep and warm — richer than black, softer than tan — and catches light along its natural grain without a hint of shine. Fully lined in cupro so it glides over tights or bare skin, it pairs as easily with fine cashmere as with a crisp poplin shirt. Precise tonal topstitching is the only detail it needs. Investment leather, cut for real life.

Material: Nappa lamb leather, cupro-lined. Colour: Espresso brown.

title: Lys Organza Blouse
tags: top, blouse, silk organza, sheer blouse, bone, white, blouson sleeve, statement top, minimalist, French seams, evening, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Lys Silk-Organza Blouson-Sleeve Blouse in Bone White — TEEORA
seo_description: A sheer silk-organza blouse with sculptural blouson sleeves in bone white. Crisp, refined statement top from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Structure and air in equal measure. Lys is made from crisp silk organza that holds a sculptural volume while remaining barely-there sheer — full blouson sleeves gather to fine buttoned cuffs, and a rounded collar keeps the neckline clean. In a soft bone white, it reads as elevated as it is easy: worn semi-tucked into tailored trousers by day, or under a blazer for evening with only a hint of what's beneath. Every seam is finished French-style so the interior is as refined as the face. A blouse with presence — light, architectural, and quietly sensual.

Material: Silk organza. Colour: Bone white.

title: Isolde Cotton-Poplin Shirt Dress
tags: dress, shirt dress, cotton poplin, stone grey, belted, midi, collared, pockets, day dress, minimalist, tailored, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Isolde Cotton-Poplin Belted Shirt Dress in Stone Grey — TEEORA
seo_description: A crisp cotton-poplin shirt dress, belted, midi length, in stone grey. Tailored everyday elegance from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The everyday piece elevated to an heirloom. Isolde takes the ease of a shirt and extends it into a belted midi dress in compact cotton poplin — crisp enough to hold a collar and cuff, fluid enough to move. A self-tie belt shapes the waist; the skirt falls in a clean A-line to mid-calf; discreet pockets sit in the side seams. In a soft stone grey that lives between the season's neutrals, it works open over a blouse, layered under a coat, or alone with sandals. Mother-of-pearl buttons and a tailored placket lift a simple silhouette into something quietly exceptional.

Material: Compact cotton poplin. Colour: Stone grey.

title: Nocturne Satin Tuxedo Jumpsuit
tags: eveningwear, jumpsuit, tuxedo, satin, black, shawl lapel, wide leg, black-tie, occasion, minimalist, tailored, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Nocturne Satin-Back Crepe Tuxedo Jumpsuit in Ink Black — TEEORA
seo_description: A plunging shawl-lapel tuxedo jumpsuit in satin-back crepe, ink black. Sleek, powerful eveningwear from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The answer to every black-tie question. Nocturne reimagines the tuxedo as a single fluid line — a plunging shawl lapel faced in liquid satin, a sharply defined waist, and a wide leg that falls clean to the floor. Cut from satin-back crepe, it reads matte and modern from the front while catching light along the lapel as you move. The ink-black is absolute. Wear it with nothing but skin and a fine heel; the tailoring does the rest. Fully lined with a concealed clasp closure and a single welt pocket, it is eveningwear with the ease of a suit and the impact of a gown.

Material: Satin-back crepe. Colour: Ink black.

title: Vesper Silk-Velvet Slip Gown
tags: eveningwear, silk velvet, slip gown, oxblood, bias cut, draped back, black-tie, floor-length, occasion, minimalist, formal, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Vesper Bias Silk-Velvet Slip Gown in Oxblood — TEEORA
seo_description: A bias-cut silk-velvet slip gown with a low draped back in deep oxblood. Fluid, minimal eveningwear from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Velvet, cut like water. Vesper is made from bias silk-velvet with enough weight to fall in one long, unbroken line and enough softness to move like liquid. The front stays clean and straight; the back drapes low; a single slit releases the walk. In a deep oxblood that reads garnet under light and near-black in shadow, it needs no jewellery and no embellishment. Fully lined in silk so it glides, it is the gown for the room you want to own quietly. Hand-finished straps and a concealed closure keep the silhouette pure from every angle.

Material: Silk-viscose velvet, bias-cut, silk-lined. Colour: Oxblood.

title: Sévère Wool Cape Coat
tags: outerwear, cape coat, wool cape, charcoal, double-faced, unlined, sculptural, knee-length, minimalist, statement, tailored, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Sévère Double-Faced Wool Cape Coat in Charcoal — TEEORA
seo_description: A sculptural double-faced virgin wool cape coat in charcoal with concealed arm slits. Architectural outerwear from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Drama without effort. Sévère is cut from double-faced virgin wool into a single sculptural sweep that falls from the shoulder to the knee, its bell shape holding structure while you move. Concealed interior slits free the arms; a hidden placket keeps the front seamless. The charcoal is deep and matte, an easy foil for every tone in the wardrobe. Unlined by virtue of its double-faced cloth and finished with hand-felled edges, it layers over tailoring or a slip with equal authority. This is outerwear as statement architecture — quiet, commanding, and cut to last a decade.

Material: Double-faced virgin wool. Colour: Charcoal.

title: Colette Double-Breasted Suit Blazer
tags: tailoring, blazer, double-breasted, wool, camel, peak lapel, suiting, structured, workwear, minimalist, evening, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Colette Double-Breasted Virgin-Wool Blazer in Camel — TEEORA
seo_description: A structured double-breasted wool-twill blazer with peak lapels in camel. Confident, modern tailoring from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The power piece of the collection. Colette is a double-breasted blazer cut from virgin wool twill with a lightly built shoulder and a long peak lapel that draws the eye up and out. It closes at the waist for a defined, confident line, then falls clean over the hip. The camel tone is rich and even — warm enough for evening, sharp enough for the boardroom. Half-canvassed by hand with jetted pockets and subtle gold-tone buttons, it wears as a suit with its matching trouser or as a standalone over denim. Structured, elegant, and unmistakably assured.

Material: Virgin wool twill. Colour: Camel.

title: Lene Satin Pyjama Trouser
tags: trousers, satin trouser, pyjama trouser, silk satin, black, high waist, eveningwear, wide leg, minimalist, tuxedo, occasion, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Lene High-Waist Silk-Satin Pyjama Trouser in Ink Black — TEEORA
seo_description: A fluid high-waisted silk-satin pyjama trouser with tuxedo side piping in ink black. Relaxed eveningwear from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Eveningwear you can breathe in. Lene borrows the ease of a pyjama and the sheen of a gown — a high-waisted silk-satin trouser that falls in a relaxed, fluid line and pools softly at the floor. A single tonal satin piping runs down the side seam for a whisper of tuxedo polish. The ink-black catches light along the leg as you move, then settles matte at rest. A hidden elasticated back keeps the waist comfortable through a long dinner. Pair with a tuxedo shirt or a fine knit for after-dark ease that never tries too hard. Fluid, refined, quietly glamorous.

Material: Silk-satin. Colour: Ink black.

title: Halo Cashmere Turtleneck Knit Dress
tags: knitwear, knit dress, cashmere, ivory, turtleneck, midi dress, column, layering, luxury knit, minimalist, day to night, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Halo Fine-Gauge Cashmere Turtleneck Knit Dress in Ivory — TEEORA
seo_description: A slim turtleneck knit dress in 100% fine-gauge cashmere, ivory, mid-calf. Tactile everyday luxury from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The quiet luxury of a second skin. Halo is knitted from fine 12-gauge cashmere into a slim turtleneck column that skims the body and falls to mid-calf, with low side vents for movement. The high ribbed neck frames the face; the fully-fashioned seams keep the line clean. In a warm ivory that glows against the skin, it is the dress that carries a season — worn alone with tall boots, layered under a cape, or belted for evening. Soft enough to live in, refined enough for anywhere, and made to be kept far longer than a single winter.

Material: 100% cashmere, fine 12-gauge knit. Colour: Ivory.

title: Séraphine Wool-Crepe Sheath Dress
tags: dress, sheath dress, wool crepe, black, bateau neck, tailored, little black dress, below knee, minimalist, workwear, occasion, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Séraphine Wool-Crepe Bateau Sheath Dress in Black — TEEORA
seo_description: A sculpted wool-crepe sheath dress with a bateau neckline in black. The re-engineered little black dress from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The little black dress, re-engineered. Séraphine is cut from structured wool-crepe that holds a sculpted line without a single visible dart, sculpting a clean sheath from a wide bateau neck to a below-knee hem. The matte black is absolute and endlessly flattering; the bonded seams keep the surface smooth as stone. A back walking vent lets it move with you from meeting to dinner. Understated to the point of severity — and all the more powerful for it. Wear it with nothing but a heel, or layer a blazer over the top. This is the dress a wardrobe is built around.

Material: Wool-crepe. Colour: Black.

title: Brume Pleated Georgette Maxi Skirt
tags: skirt, maxi skirt, pleated skirt, silk georgette, sage, high waist, knife pleat, fluid, minimalist, occasion, day to night, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Brume Knife-Pleated Silk-Georgette Maxi Skirt in Sage — TEEORA
seo_description: A fine knife-pleated silk-georgette maxi skirt in muted sage. Fluid, airy, high-waisted elegance from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Movement made visible. Brume is a fine knife-pleated skirt in silk georgette that falls in a fluid maxi column and catches the air with every step. The high grosgrain waistband keeps the line clean; the permanent pleats hold their crispness while the cloth stays weightless. In a muted sage drawn from the season's palette, it reads soft and sophisticated against ivory knits or a black sheath. A semi-sheer lining preserves the airy hand. Wear it high and simple with a crisp shirt, or with a fine knit tucked in — either way, it brings quiet motion to a still room.

Material: Silk georgette, knife-pleated. Colour: Sage.

title: Faye Cotton-Poplin Tuxedo Shirt
tags: top, shirt, tuxedo shirt, cotton poplin, bone, white, boyfriend fit, pleated bib, minimalist, day to night, wardrobe staple, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Faye Cotton-Poplin Tuxedo Shirt in Bone White — TEEORA
seo_description: A crisp cotton-poplin tuxedo shirt with a pleated bib in bone white. The elevated white shirt from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
The white shirt, elevated to evening. Faye takes a compact cotton poplin — crisp, matte, and substantial — and adds a subtly pleated tuxedo bib that lifts it from staple to statement. The cut is relaxed and boyfriend-easy through the shoulder, with a curved hem made to wear out or tucked. Mother-of-pearl buttons and clean single-button cuffs keep the finish quietly luxurious. In a soft bone white, it anchors the whole collection: worn with a satin trouser for after-dark, knotted over a maxi skirt by day, or under a blazer. The one shirt that does the work of five.

Material: Compact cotton poplin. Colour: Bone white.

title: Wren Merino Fine-Knit Cardigan
tags: knitwear, cardigan, merino wool, camel, V-neck, cropped, layering, fine knit, minimalist, wardrobe staple, top, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Wren Extra-Fine Merino V-Neck Cardigan in Camel — TEEORA
seo_description: A slim, slightly cropped extra-fine merino cardigan with a low V-neck in camel. Refined layering knitwear from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Understatement, buttoned up. Wren is a slim, slightly cropped cardigan knitted from extra-fine merino in a delicate 12-gauge rib — light enough to layer, refined enough to wear alone as a top. The low V-neck lengthens the line; small tonal enamel buttons keep the front discreet. In a warm camel that bridges the collection's neutrals, it slips under a blazer, over a crisp shirt, or on its own with high-waisted trousers. Fully-fashioned seams and ribbed cuffs give it a clean, durable finish. A quiet, hard-working layer that elevates everything it touches — and asks for nothing in return.

Material: Extra-fine merino wool, 12-gauge rib. Colour: Camel.

title: Lune Belted Leather Trench
tags: outerwear, leather trench, plongé leather, greige, belted coat, mid-calf, drop shoulder, luxury leather, minimalist, seasonless, investment, A/W 2026, Sables
seo_title: Lune Belted Plongé Leather Trench in Greige — TEEORA
seo_description: A soft plongé lamb leather trench, belted, mid-calf, in elegant greige. The investment leather layer from TEEORA A/W 2026.
body_html:
Leather, softened into a robe. Lune is cut from plongé lamb — supple enough to drape and tie like cloth — into a relaxed trench that wraps and belts at the waist and falls fluid to mid-calf. The greige tone sits between bone and taupe, a rare, elegant neutral that reads far richer than black. A notch collar, welt pockets and fine tonal topstitching keep it clean; a viscose lining lets it glide over knitwear. Belt it for shape or leave it open over a knit dress. This is the investment layer — soft, seasonless, and quietly extraordinary.

Material: Plongé lamb leather, viscose-lined. Colour: Greige.
